prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市最低录取位次分别为2569名、2546名、2754名、3065名、2889名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约320名；2025年基准位次约2889名，较2024年有所回升；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为229人，2024年增至237人，2025年略降至235人；2026年计划大幅增至275人，较2025年扩招约17%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第15名→2024年第12名→2025年第11名→2026年第11名，稳居全国顶尖高校前列；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因导师杨昀严重师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第56位（较热），短视频曝光量一般；近年无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术、仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程等7个学科获评A+，A-及以上学科共16个，学科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航优势专业大类社会热度持续偏高（2026年专业热度分析显示计算机类仍为高热推荐）；北京市2026年高考报名人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；北航位于北京市，为本市考生首选工科院校之一；学校所在地与考生同省，地域偏好优势明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+17%）对竞争的缓解、北京市考生人数激增（+29.7%）带来的竞争加剧、以及声誉负面事件的有限抑制效应，考虑竞争加剧因素小幅修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约3134名，区间2777–3491名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖学生培养计划）
- 工科试验班类（未来空天领军计划）
- 工科试验班类（计算与智能科学类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班类（信息科学与技术类）
- 工科试验班类（航空航天类）
- 工科试验班类（医工交叉试验班）
- 理科试验班类（中法工程师试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（含法学、行政管理、经济学）
- 社会科学试验班（外语交叉学科人才培养试验班）
- 工科试验班类（中法航空试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3134名，区间2777–3491名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2700名以内）可重点冲刺一档的计算机拔尖计划或未来空天领军计划；位次接近区间上限（如3400名以后）建议以三档的中外合作办学项目为主，同时关注二档中位次相对友好的航空航天类和信息类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings in Beijing were 2569, 2546, 2754, 3065, and 2889 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 320 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2889, a recovery from 2024; the comprehensive enrollment plan at this university in Beijing was 229 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 237 in 2024, and slightly decreased to 235 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 275 students, an expansion of about 17% compared to 2025, which is notable and may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising, from 15th in 2021 to 12th in 2024, 11th in 2025, and 11th in 2026, firmly among the top universities in China; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to serious teacher misconduct and academic integrity incidents involving mentor Yang Yun, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with average short video exposure; no recent enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 7 disciplines including Aerospace Science and Technology, Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were rated A+, with a total of 16 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beihang's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (2026 major popularity analysis shows Computer Science remains a high-recommendation hot major); the number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, leading to a significant increase in competition; Beihang is located in Beijing and is one of the preferred engineering schools for local candidates; the school is in the same province as the candidates, giving it a clear regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical fluctuating and backward trend of rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+17%) alleviating competition, the surge in Beijing candidates (+29.7%) intensifying competition, and the limited suppression effect of negative reputation events, with a slight adjustment for increased competition, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 3134, with a range of 2777–3491.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Training Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Aviation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Sino-French Engineer Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Administrative Management, Economics)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Foreign Language Cross-Disciplinary Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Sino-French Aviation Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3134, range 2777–3491. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 2700), focus on reaching for Tier 1's Computer Top Talent Program or Future Aerospace Leading Program; for rankings near the upper bound (e.g., after 3400), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3's Sino-foreign cooperative programs, while also paying attention to Tier 2's relatively ranking-friendly Aerospace and Information categories.
